name: D2-Codex
tagline: Readable Codex status on Even glasses
description: Bridge a paired Codex session from Developer Dashboard onto the Even app and glasses with a guided phone-side setup flow and a readable on-glasses status layout.
changelog: Added normalized staged query controls, simulator-safe glasses click handling, and screenshot-reviewed input proof in the noVNC desktop.

permissions.name: network
permissions.desc: This app needs network access to reach the paired D2-Codex LAN bridge.
